data.title: Visual Storytelling
data.description: Focuses on sharing experiences visually rather than textually.
data.technical_spec: Emphasis on photo and video content creation tools.

data.title: Community Engagement
data.description: Facilitates social interactions through likes, comments, and sharing.
data.technical_spec: Algorithms that prioritize engagement-driven content in feeds.

data.title: Innovation in Features
data.description: Constantly evolving with new tools like Reels and Filters to enhance creativity.
data.technical_spec: Integration of AR and AI for dynamic content features.

data.title: Influencer-centric
data.description: Caters to content creators and influencers as key user segments.
data.technical_spec: Features and metrics that cater to content reach and audience insights.

data.title: Seamless Integration
data.description: Provides a smooth experience with other Facebook-owned applications.
data.technical_spec: Cross-platform integration via unified messaging and notifications.
